title: Cappy Infladitos Queso Edamame
ingredients: Crushed Cappy Infladitos Queso chips for finishing
instructions: Step 1. Heat the olive oil or butter in a skillet over medium heat.
Step 2. Add the edamame and sauté for 3 to 5 minutes until hot and lightly golden.
Step 3. Season with salt to taste and remove from heat.
Step 4. Serve the edamame hot and finish by sprinkling crushed Cappy Infladitos Queso chips on top for a crunchy texture and intense flavor before serving.
description: Edamame sautéed with butter or olive oil, finished with a crunchy, flavor-packed topping of Cappy Infladitos Queso chips. An easy, quick, and addictive snack.
